== Notes for [[Item:Q84853|Q84853]] ==

'''
=Lucius Junius Caesennius Paetus=
'''

Lucius Junius Caesennius Paetus (c. 45 - aft. 94) was a Roman politician.

He was the son and namesake of Lucius Caesennius Paetus and wife Flavia.

He was Consul Suffectus in 79 and later Proconsul of Asia in 93 or 94.

He married and had a son, also Lucius Junius Caesennius Paetus, born c. 65, who married Arria Antonina, born c. 70, a maternal aunt of Antoninus Pius, and had a son Lucius Caesennius Antoninus.

'''Source : '''

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucius_Junius_Caesennius_Paetus

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
